title: Mr. Tambourine Man
why_this_song: Mr. Tambourine Man by Bob Dylan (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Hey, Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Hey, Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Hey, Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm not sleepy and there is no place I'm going to"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I'm not sleepy and there is no place I'm going to"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tambourine" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tambourine" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "play" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "play" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I promise to go under it

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Mr. Tambourine Man" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Mr. Tambourine Man" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Mr. Tambourine Man" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Mr. Tambourine Man"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bob Dylan one question about "Mr. Tambourine Man", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bob Dylan sobre "Mr. Tambourine Man", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
